text.heading: NATIONAL BUSINESS AND TECHNICAL EXAMINATIONS BOARD
NATIONAL BUSINESS AND TECHNICAL CERTIFICATE EXAMINATIONS
INSTRUCTIONS:
text.p: Attempt NINE questions in all. All candidates should attempt ALL the questions in Section A. ALL candidates EXCEPT Secretarial and Business candidates should attempt FOUR questions from Section B. Secretarial and Business candidates are to attempt TWO questions ONLY from Section B and ANY OTHER TWO questions from Section C.
In each question, all necessary details of working, including rough work, must be shown with the answer as accurate as tables and data allow. Non-programmable and cordless calculators are allowed.
The following may be provided for use in the examination ;
(c) Mathematical and Statistical Tables and Formulae.
